description:
Enterprise only. The Virtual Host server allows you to run different configurations of Pucora endpoints based on the host accessing the server.

See: https://pucora.in/docs/enterprise/service-settings/virtual-hosts/

hosts.title: Virtualhosts
hosts.description:
All recognized virtual hosts by Pucora must be listed here. The values declared here must match the content of the `Host` header when passed by the client.

See: https://pucora.in/docs/enterprise/service-settings/virtual-hosts/
